steps.instruction: Check the file size limit. Many systems restrict uploads to 25MB or 50MB. If your file is larger, try compressing it into a `.zip` archive before uploading.
Verify the file format. Ensure you are uploading a supported file type (e.g., `.pdf`, `.docx`, `.jpg`, `.png`). Unsupported formats will be rejected.
Ensure the file isn't corrupted. Try opening the file on your local computer. If it won't open for you, it is damaged and needs to be recreated or re-downloaded.
Clear your web browser cache and cookies, then refresh the page and attempt the upload again.
Try using an Incognito/Private window or a completely different web browser to rule out interference from browser extensions.
